assertions.description: The CSS property the feature depends on is parsed as text-overflow: ellipsis.
A single-line overflowing element can keep computed text-overflow: ellipsis, which is the state Chrome 148 clips while interacting.
assertions.test: (()=>{const e=document.createElement('div');e.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:0;top:0;width:80px;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;text-overflow:ellipsis;';e.textContent='This is a deliberately long overflowing label for ellipsis interaction.';document.body.append(e);const cs=getComputedStyle(e);const ok=cs.textOverflow.includes('ellipsis')&&cs.whiteSpace==='nowrap'&&e.scrollWidth>e.clientWidth;e.remove();return ok;})()

assertions.description: A focused contenteditable overflow target remains in the computed ellipsis state eligible for Chrome's interaction rendering.
assertions.test: (()=>{const e=document.createElement('div');e.contentEditable='true';e.tabIndex=0;e.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:0;top:0;width:90px;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;text-overflow:ellipsis;';e.textContent='Editable overflowing text that should reveal while the caret is active.';document.body.append(e);e.focus();const cs=getComputedStyle(e);const ok=document.activeElement===e&&cs.textOverflow.includes('ellipsis')&&e.scrollWidth>e.clientWidth;e.remove();return ok;})()

assertions.description: A focusable non-editable overflow target can receive text selection while retaining computed text-overflow: ellipsis.
assertions.test: (()=>{const e=document.createElement('div');e.tabIndex=0;e.style.cssText='position:fixed;left:0;top:0;width:90px;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;text-overflow:ellipsis;';e.textContent='Selectable overflowing non editable text for ellipsis interaction.';document.body.append(e);e.focus();const r=document.createRange();r.selectNodeContents(e);const s=getSelection();s.removeAllRanges();s.addRange(r);const cs=getComputedStyle(e);const ok=document.activeElement===e&&s.toString().length>0&&cs.textOverflow.includes('ellipsis')&&e.scrollWidth>e.clientWidth;s.removeAllRanges();e.remove();return ok;})()

assertions.description: A text input with a long value can be focused at the caret while retaining computed text-overflow: ellipsis.
